response.justification: Bogdan brings roughly 15+ years of hands-on fullstack development, well beyond the 6-year requirement, with recent production work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB, plus AWS and Kubernetes exposure. His current role explicitly covers AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, which satisfies the rarest requirement in this JD. A CS degree from MIT and a long record of teaching, talks, and test-driven craftsmanship round out a strong profile. The gaps are stack-specific rather than fundamental: no explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, or Vitest experience, and much of his frontend history is Ember rather than React, but these are learnable given his demonstrated polyglot range.
strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB in production settings
Current hands-on AI agent and MCP tooling work, directly matching the AI agent development requirement
Strong testing and craftsmanship culture: TDD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses and workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Kotlin experience, and Java exposure appears dated
Frontend depth skews toward Ember.js; React experience is comparatively recent and narrower
Named testing tools (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) are not listed, and Python is absent from the skills list

key_factors.factor: Deep fullstack TS/Node/React experience plus AI agent and MCP work
Testing expertise, mentoring, and communication track record
Missing Nest.js/Kotlin and partial frontend framework overlap
